title: First Publication
description: The site is published for the first time on GitHub Pages with a simple landing page. Official start of the personal portfolio project.

title: First CSS Experiments
description: Added the first CSS animations and graphic improvements. Implementation of smooth transitions and hover effects.

title: React Introduction
description: The site is completely rewritten in React for better state management and interactions. Build system configuration with Create React App.

title: Routing Implementation
description: Added React Router for page navigation. Creation of the first main routes: Home, About, Projects.

title: Projects Section Added
description: Implemented the Projects section with a detailed list of personal and professional projects. Added filters and categorization.

title: Internationalization
description: Implemented multilingual support with react-i18next. The site now supports Italian and English with dynamic switching.

title: GitHub API Integration
description: The site now shows recent GitHub repositories via GitHub API. Implementation of caching and error handling.

title: Advanced Theme System
description: Implementation of Tailwind CSS and theme system. Support for light/dark theme with preference persistence.

title: Complete Responsive Design
description: Completely rebuilt the layout to be responsive on all devices. Mobile-first design optimizations.

title: Framer Motion Animations
description: Integrated smooth animations and micro-interactions using Framer Motion. Animated page transitions and loading states.

title: Blog Section and CMS
description: Implemented the Blog section with content management system. Support for Markdown and code syntax highlighting.

title: Performance and PWA
description: Performance optimizations: lazy loading, code splitting, image compression. PWA implementation with service worker.

title: SEO and Analytics
description: Complete SEO optimizations: dynamic meta tags, sitemap, structured data. Google Analytics integration and event tracking.

title: Advanced Dark Mode
description: Implemented advanced dark mode with ThemeSwitch, smooth transitions and localStorage persistence. System preference support.

title: Interactive Books Section
description: Added dedicated books section with interactive reader, breadcrumb navigation and reading progress tracking.

title: Gaming System
description: Implementation of interactive mini-games with leaderboard and scoring system. GSAP integration for gaming animations.

title: API and Backend
description: Development of custom APIs for dynamic content management. Implementation of comments and feedback system.

title: Architectural Refactor
description: Major architecture refactoring: migration to custom hooks, context API, and more modern design patterns.

title: AI Integration
description: Experimentation with AI integration for content generation and assistance chatbot. Implementation of innovative features.

title: Animated Grid Demo
description: Added animated grid game demo with Framer Motion and GSAP. Showcase of game development and animation skills.

title: Completely Renewed About Page
description: Complete refactor of the About page with dynamic statistics, interactive timeline, and GitHub API integration for real-time data.

title: Improved Routing System
description: Complete migration to hash-based routing for optimal GitHub Pages compatibility. Implementation of custom navigation hooks.

title: Modernized History Page
description: Completion of History page refactor with modern design, detailed statistics, interactive tabs and advanced GitHub data visualization.
